case_title: DOUGLAS HIROSHI PARK VS. ITIKA ROBINSON

docket_entries.description: REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARK, DOUGLAS HIROSHI ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF DOUGLAS PARK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ITIKA ROBINSON IS PRESENT. MATTER DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE FOR IMPROPER DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JONATHAN POLLAND; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
